name: Dr.randy Jouno's Guadalajara,mx Champ Chili
recipeIngredient: 27 ounces Can whole green chiles, drained, seeded, and chopped
4 ounces Bar milk chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large saucepan until hot.
2. Add 1 pound beef and brown on all sides. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside. Repeat until all beef is browned.
3. Use additional oil as needed. Return all beef to the saucepan.
4. Add 6 cups water, tomato paste, onions, celery salt, spices, herbs, and green chiles; mix well.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer, covered, for 90 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add remaining water.
7. Mix in chocolate; simmer, covered for 30 minutes, stirring often.
